name: Masala Omelette
tagline: Indian-style omelette — onion, chili, coriander, golden fold
highlight: Pour the eggs over fully-cooked masala, not the other way round — clean fold

hero.alt: Folded golden omelette flecked with green chili, onion, and coriander on a plate
hero.caption: masala omelette — folded, soft-set, fragrant

healthFacts: Three eggs hit 18g protein, 2.5µg B12, and 1µg vitamin D — breakfast bedrock.
Selenium and biotin from yolks support thyroid hormone activation.
Lutein and zeaxanthin in yolks protect macular pigment in eyes.
Choline supports phosphatidylcholine synthesis — liver and brain need it daily.

steps.title: Whisk and prep
steps.detail: Whisk the eggs with salt and pepper for 30 seconds — until pale yellow and frothy. Have all chopped vegetables ready before the pan goes on.

steps.title: Quick-sauté the filling
steps.detail: Heat ghee in a non-stick pan. Toss in onion, green chili, and tomato. Cook 60 seconds till tomato softens. Stir in coriander.
steps.tip: Pre-cook the filling — raw onion in a folded omelette stays crunchy and watery.

steps.title: Pour, set, fold
steps.detail: Pour the whisked eggs over the masala. Tilt the pan to spread evenly. Cook on low for 90 seconds till just set on top. Slide a spatula and fold in half. Serve immediately.
steps.tip: Pull off the heat the moment the top loses its sheen — carryover heat finishes the centre.
